stance: Risk-on within the infra theme: lean back into strong-momentum + rising-analyst-revision capex/defense/T&D winners, prune the decayed low-momentum tail.
experience_note: This is an early round with no graded track to learn from yet (last_round_review is null), so these are honest pre-registered bets. I am watching three things that would change my mind: (1) whether the extreme-momentum names (STLTECH, MTARTECH) keep their revision support or roll over into an estimate-cut — if revisions fade while price stalls, I cut fast; (2) whether the metals/mining cluster (NATIONALUM, NMDC, HINDZINC, HINDALCO, VEDL) holds up — it is a correlated commodity bet and a global-cycle turn would hit several names at once; (3) whether the T&D/power-capex theme (POWERINDIA, TDPOWERSYS, ATLANTAELE, THERMAX) keeps its order-flow. I am pre-registering that I sized the strongest dual-signal names biggest and the divergence names (high price momentum but falling revisions: SCHNEIDER, HINDCOPPER, BHEL) at zero — if those divergence names outperform my picks, my thesis that revision momentum adds to price momentum is wrong.
